interventions.name: C4 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: before-and-after refactor analyses requiring one named maintainability improvement and one preserved behavior claim

interventions.name: C4 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: behavior-preservation checks that pair a revision with bounded tests or specification references

interventions.name: C4 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: code-review style prompts that require a change rationale suitable for collaborators

interventions.name: C4 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired refactor tasks that reapply one maintainability pattern in a second bounded code example
